geo_signals.summary: State-sponsored APT groups linked to South China Sea territorial disputes are actively targeting regional manufacturing supply chains. Trade tension escalation between major powers is increasing the frequency of state-directed industrial espionage campaigns.
lead_indicators: South China Sea territorial dispute escalation

cyber_signals.summary: APT campaign targeting turbine manufacturing IP and OT/SCADA networks. Intrusion attempts focused on exfiltrating proprietary blade design specifications and disrupting predictive maintenance data pipelines.
cyber_signals.threat_vector: System intrusion via spear-phishing and supply chain compromise

geopolitical_context: State-sponsored APT groups in the South China Sea are targeting regional supply chains. Elevated risk of System Intrusion targeting manufacturing IP and SCADA networks to disrupt regional turbine production.
